headline: DAT brings focus on workflow automation and market intelligence to 2026 TIA Capital Ideas Conference
summary: PHOENIX, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amid uncertainty across both freight and the broader macroeconomic environment, DAT Freight & Analytics comes to the 2026 TIA Capital Ideas Conference in Phoenix as a one-stop shop for trusted capacity, automation and real-time insights. “This is the most complete edition of DAT that’s ever come to a TIA conference,” said Kary Jablonski, EVP, Broker Segment and Trucker Tools. “With DAT iQ, Convoy Platform, Trucker Tools, and DAT One all under one roof,
